Home.tagline: A nomadic photo and video production studio.
Home.sub: Local selection. Art direction. Consistency, city by city.

meta.title: Creators — Admara Studio
meta.description: Photo and video production for creators. A nomadic studio with curated local talent and art direction tailored to your world.

hero.title: Photo and video production, tuned to your world.
hero.sub: A nomadic studio. Local talent selected city by city. Art direction set before every shoot.

whyUs.title: Not a generic agency. A selective studio.
whyUs.intro: Each ADMARA production rests on local selection, prepared art direction and structured coordination. Nothing is left to chance.

selection.title: Local selection
selection.body: Photographers and videographers curated city by city. Each talent is chosen for their eye, consistency and reliability.

direction.title: Art direction
direction.body: Every project is framed upstream. Intent, format, world, output: all defined before the shoot.

delivery.title: Delivered in 14 days
delivery.body: Timeline written into the brief. No follow-up needed. Your content lands on the agreed date.

nomadic.title: A nomadic studio
nomadic.body: ADMARA settles in a city for several months to build a creative network. Limited sessions per season.

howItWorks.title: From first call to delivery.
howItWorks.intro: Five clear steps. No surprises. Every milestone is set before the shoot so production runs without friction.

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.body: Fifteen minutes with Alyssia to understand your world and your project.

matching.title: Talent matching
matching.body: Alyssia selects a photographer or videographer whose eye matches the intent.

booking.title: Quote and payment
booking.body: Quote confirmed. Payment via secure link. Date locked.

preshoot.title: Pre-shoot
preshoot.body: Check-in three days before the session to settle the final details.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Production then delivery within fourteen days, content ready to publish.

pricing.title: Public pricing. No post-call surprises.
pricing.intro: Four formats for four intents. Each pack can be tailored during the Discovery Call. No payment is asked before the quote is signed off.
pricing.reassurance: Listed prices exclude city-specific travel costs. Details are shared during the Discovery Call based on the current city.

discover.name: Discover
discover.body: Short session. One selected photographer. Quick delivery to try ADMARA on a simple format.

signature.name: Signature
signature.body: Half-day shoot. Art direction set. Delivered within fourteen days, primary photo format.

editorial.name: Editorial
editorial.body: Full day. Coordinated photo and video. Multi-format content ready to publish across channels.

recurring.name: Recurring
recurring.body: One session per month in the current city. Visual consistency over time. Ideal for established creators.

about.title: A studio opening up.
about.p1: ADMARA Studio is a nomadic photo and video production. We settle in a city for several months to build a network of local talent and run tailored sessions.
about.p2: We are starting Season 01. We build in transparency with our first creators and our first photographers.

ctaForm.title: Talk about your project.
ctaForm.sub: A few short questions to frame your world, then you book a slot with Alyssia.
ctaForm.reassurance: Reply within 24 hours. No data sold. European GDPR.

meta.title: Brands — Admara Studio
meta.description: Photo and video production for brands. A nomadic studio with curated local talent and art direction serving your visual identity.

hero.title: Production tuned to your brand.
hero.sub: A nomadic studio. Local talent selected city by city. Art direction aligned with your visual identity and your campaign.

whyUs.title: Not a vendor. A production partner.
whyUs.intro: ADMARA builds each production on local selection, framed art direction and structured coordination. Your campaigns run without friction, from brief to delivery.

selection.title: Local selection
selection.body: A network of photographers and videographers curated city by city. Talent chosen for their eye and their fit with your world.

direction.title: Art direction
direction.body: Brief framed before every shoot. Intent, format, visual line, deliverables: all defined upstream with your team.

delivery.title: Fast delivery
delivery.body: Timelines written into the quote. Coordinated production. Content delivered ready to ship on your channels.

nomadic.title: Local presence
nomadic.body: ADMARA settles in a metropolis for several months to deploy a creative network. Sessions opened by season.

howItWorks.title: From brief to delivery.
howItWorks.intro: Five structured steps. Every milestone is shared with your team to align intent, budget and deliverables before the shoot.

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.body: Thirty minutes with Alyssia to understand your brand, your goals and the campaign context.

brief.title: Creative brief
brief.body: Art direction written. Local talent selected based on intent.

booking.title: Quote and PO
booking.body: Quote signed off. Purchase order or payment aligned with your internal process.

preshoot.title: Pre-shoot
preshoot.body: Check-in one week before the session. Locations, team and final deliverables confirmed.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Production then delivery within the quoted timeline. Content formatted for your distribution channels.

pricing.title: Public pricing. Detailed quote after the call.
pricing.intro: Four formats for four B2B intents. Each pack can be tailored to actual scope during the Discovery Call. No commitment before a signed-off quote.
pricing.reassurance: Listed prices exclude travel costs, extended usage rights and specific options. Details are confirmed in the quote.

discovery.name: Brand Discovery
discovery.body: First collaboration. One photo session, one curated talent, deliverables formatted for your main channels.

editorial.name: Brand Editorial
editorial.body: Full editorial production. Coordinated photo and video. Art direction aligned with your brand identity.

campaign.name: Brand Campaign
campaign.body: Two to three day campaign. Larger crew, multiple locations, multi-format deliverables ready to publish.

retainer.name: Brand Retainer
retainer.body: Monthly engagement. Recurring production with a dedicated photographer. Visual consistency over time.

about.title: A studio opening up.
about.p1: ADMARA Studio is a nomadic photo and video production. We settle in a city for several months to build a network of selected local talent.
about.p2: Season 01 is the opening of our first sessions. We work in transparency with our first brand partners.

ctaForm.title: Talk about your campaign.
ctaForm.sub: A few questions to frame your intent and constraints, then you book a slot with Alyssia.
ctaForm.reassurance: Reply within 24 hours. No data sold. European GDPR.

Footer.tagline: Photo and video production. Curated photographers in Southeast Asia.
